Triton Database — Query Language

Triton Database speaks ANSI SQL with extensions for analytical workloads. SELECT, JOIN (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL), GROUP BY, HAVING, WHERE, and ORDER BY clauses behave per the standard. Window functions, CTEs, and recursive queries are supported. Query plans are cached to amortise compilation cost across repeated SELECT statements. Triton Database SELECT queries, INNER JOIN, LEFT OUTER JOIN, GROUP BY clauses, HAVING filters, and recursive CTEs are documented here. Triton Database query optimisation uses cost-based plan selection.
